roles.name: Fast Bowler
roles.description: High-intensity bowler requiring extreme lower body bracing forces, shoulder/rotational velocity, and repeat sprint ability.

roles.name: Spinner
roles.description: Rotational specialist requiring extreme trunk/hip separation, finger-wrist snap capacity, and shoulder rotator cuff endurance.

roles.name: Batter
roles.description: Requires high-velocity bat speed, quick reaction times, hand-eye coordination, and multi-directional acceleration/deceleration.

roles.name: Wicket Keeper
roles.description: Squat-dominant specialist requiring isometric lower body endurance, ultra-fast lateral reactive agility, and hand speed.

roles.name: All Rounder
roles.description: Generalist requiring balanced development of both high workload capacity (aerobic/anaerobic) and explosive power.

assessments.name: CMJ
assessments.description: Countermovement Jump test executed on a force plate or jump mat to evaluate vertical power.

assessments.name: Broad Jump
assessments.description: Standing horizontal jump test measuring horizontal explosive power and force projection.

assessments.name: 10m Sprint
assessments.description: Linear sprint test from stationary start to evaluate acceleration mechanics.

assessments.name: 20m Sprint
assessments.description: Linear sprint test evaluating transitional speed and near-maximum velocity.

assessments.name: Pull Up
assessments.description: Bodyweight pull up test to assess upper body pulling relative strength and shoulder girdle robustness.

assessments.name: Trap Bar Deadlift
assessments.description: Maximal load deadlift performed using a hex bar to evaluate absolute lower body strength.

assessments.name: Rotational Med Ball Throw
assessments.description: Transverse medicine ball throw against a wall to evaluate rotational power output.

deficits.name: Power Deficit
deficits.description: Athlete is lacking lower body elastic force development and vertical power output.

deficits.name: Strength Deficit
deficits.description: Athlete falls below absolute lower body force requirements.

deficits.name: Acceleration Deficit
deficits.description: Athlete displays sub-optimal initial drive phase speeds.

deficits.name: Speed Deficit
deficits.description: Athlete exhibits sub-optimal maximum linear running speeds.

deficits.name: Mobility Restriction
deficits.description: Athlete exhibits joint restriction limiting full triple extension dynamics.
